milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a.8 — 4-quadrant tile layout with full-width summary. User-directed restructure of .dash-tile: eyebrow + title live in the left two rows; the status quadrant (duration + state) anchors the top-right; summary, flags, coverage, and progress span the full width beneath so the description has room to breathe. Grab column stays leading on every row. grid-template-areas defines the six rows ('grab eyebrow trailing' / 'grab title trailing' / 'grab summary summary' / 'grab flags flags' / 'grab coverage coverage' / 'grab progress progress'); rows whose area isn't emitted collapse. Dropped: the .dash-tile-content wrapper (children are now direct grid items of .dash-tile), the .dash-tile-icons sub-row (all pin/mastery/delete slots retired in earlier milestones; future status lives in the top-right quadrant with an optional overflow ⋯ glyph). .dash-tile-trailing simplified to an inline-flex row, right-justified, status-only. .dash-tile-summary switched from 1-line nowrap ellipsis to 2-line clamp so longer descriptions can read naturally. Three renderers updated (renderLearnItemRow / renderDashLearn / renderContinueCard). M9.19a.9 adds the expand-on-tap behavior next: condensed tile grows into a larger container with dimmed backdrop, showing full details with larger tap targets, per user's 'progressive disclosure' direction.
